projects.title: AI-Onboarder
projects.description: An intelligent platform that analyzes codebases and automatically generates comprehensive onboarding documentation using advanced LLMs.
projects.longDescription: AI-Onboarder revolutionizes developer onboarding by automatically analyzing your codebase structure, architecture patterns, and implementation details to generate human-readable documentation. Built with cutting-edge AI integration.
highlights: Integrated Google Gemini LLM for intelligent code analysis
Automated repository ingestion and processing workflows

projects.title: Nikhil's Cloud
projects.description: A self-hosted cloud storage system offering secure file access, multi-user support, and deployment on personal hardware infrastructure.
projects.longDescription: A fully self-hosted cloud platform with enterprise-grade security features, enabling secure file management, sharing, and backup across multiple users.
highlights: End-to-end encryption for secure file storage
Multi-user access control and permission management

projects.title: DH-AES Scheme for IoT Healthcare
projects.description: An innovative secure communication system combining Diffie-Hellman and AES encryption for IoT medical telemetry with peer-reviewed publication.
projects.longDescription: Research-backed cryptographic implementation for secure IoT healthcare communications. Published at IEEE Conference.
highlights: Published research findings at IEEE Conference
Tested across multiple IoT healthcare devices
Addressed real-world medical data security challenges

projects.title: Leaderboard Website
projects.description: A dynamic leaderboard tracking coding competition scores with advanced web scraping, intelligent search, and comprehensive performance analytics.
projects.longDescription: Tracks competitive coding scores with real-time updates, powerful search capabilities, and detailed analytics dashboards for student performance monitoring.
